title: Syrian Chickpea Crumble
description: A hearty and flavorful Syrian-inspired dessert crumble made with chickpea flour and topped with a crunchy buttery crumble. Perfect for a warm evening or special occasion.

ingredients.name: crumbly buttery mixture
ingredients.notes: a mix of crumbly and buttery ingredients

ingredients.name: crumble topping
ingredients.notes: a mix of crumbly and buttery ingredients

instructions: Mix chickpea flour, syrup, honey, water, lemon juice, and flour in a large bowl.
Add crumbly buttery mixture and mix until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x9 inch baking dish.
Mix crumble topping ingredients in a separate bowl.
Spread the crumble topping evenly over the baking dish.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
